items.title: Here's Michael Saylor's Year End Bitcoin Price Target
items.description: Bitcoin would reach $150,000 by year end, according to Strategy (NASDAQ:MSTR) Chair Michael Saylor. “Our expectation right now is end of the year, it [Bitcoin] should be about $150,000,” Saylor told CNBC on Monday on the sidelines of the Money 20/20 ...

items.title: JPC: Fear Of Banking Sector Losses May Pressure Preferred Stocks
items.description: Nuveen Preferred & Income Opportunities Fund (JPC) offers a 9.78% yield, outperforming preferred stock indices and peer funds on total return and income. Read the full analysis here.

items.title: Bitcoin Network Hashrate Hit Record High in October, JPMorgan Says
items.description: The monthly average network hashrate, a proxy for competition in the industry and mining difficulty, rose 5% to 1,082 EH/s.

items.title: Third-quarter earnings are indicating a divided economy
items.description: Quarterly earnings reports from consumer companies are increasingly showing how consumers are diverging in their spending.
